messages.content:
-- prompted by john
Hey John! How can I help you with Roblox Studio today?

-- prompted by john
local part = script.Parent

part.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
    local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
    if humanoid then
        humanoid.Health = 0
    end
end)
I dont see a copy button

-- prompted by john
You can simply highlight and copy the script text from my previous response. There's no copy button in this chat interface—just select the code and use Ctrl+C (or Cmd+C on Mac).

Need help with anything else in Roblox Studio?

```lua
-- prompted by john
local part = script.Parent

part.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
    local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
    if humanoid then
        humanoid.Health = 0
    end
end)
```
However now i need every single part in the game thats called "Kill" to function as a killbrick, could you do that?

```lua
-- prompted by john
local function makeKillBrick(part)
    if part:IsA("BasePart") then
        part.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
            local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
            if humanoid then
                humanoid.Health = 0
            end
        end)
    end
end

-- Apply to existing parts named "Kill"
for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
    if descendant.Name == "Kill" then
        makeKillBrick(descendant)
    end
end

-- Handle any future parts named "Kill"
workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
    if descendant.Name == "Kill" then
        makeKillBrick(descendant)
    end
end)
```

```lua
-- prompted by john
local function makeKillBrick(part)
    if part:IsA("BasePart") then
        part.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
            local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
            if humanoid then
                humanoid.Health = 0
            end
        end)
    end
end

-- Apply to ALL existing parts named "Kill" (recursively checks folders, models, etc.)
for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
    if descendant.Name == "Kill" then
        makeKillBrick(descendant)
    end
end

-- Handle ANY future parts named "Kill" added anywhere in workspace
workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
    if descendant.Name == "Kill" then
        makeKillBrick(descendant)
    end
end)
```

This script:
- Uses `GetDescendants()` to find **all** parts named "Kill" in the entire workspace hierarchy (including inside folders, models, etc.)
- Uses `DescendantAdded` to catch new "Kill" parts added later (even if placed inside folders)
- Only affects `BasePart` objects (so folders named "Kill" are safely ignored)
